summary: Full backend + frontend testing of ITCAN PC Builder (Arabic RTL React + FastAPI + MongoDB, Gemini 3 Flash). 5/5 backend pytest tests pass (root health, ai/chat Arabic, ai/chat multi-turn, ai/diagnose with real JPEG, builds POST+GET). 9/9 frontend flows pass via Playwright on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL: home + RTL + TFT418 image, currency SAR↔USD, builder price math (450+650+150+850+420=2520 SAR matches displayed), 3D canvas mounts, progress 5/8, prebuilt 4 cards + budget slider, cases gallery 16 total with all 7 filters (all=16, black=8, white=8, panoramic=4, cube=4, tower=2, premium=2), AI chat Arabic reply, AI diagnose with uploaded JPEG returns Arabic diagnosis, floating WhatsApp uses 966563036134.

issues: React hydration warning in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Likely caused by FontAwesome auto-replacing an <i> with a <span> inside <option>, or a stray inline span. Not breaking functionality but should be cleaned up — option text in /app/frontend/src/components/PCBuilder.jsx lines 125-129 should be plain text only (curr.symbol must be a string, no JSX inside <option>).

action_items: Investigate and silence the React hydration warning about <span> inside <option> in PCBuilder.jsx — likely an icon being rendered inside an option element somewhere.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses logger before it is defined: logger is initialised at line 273 but referenced at line 174 inside ai_chat exception handler. Currently safe only because the except path hasn't been hit in tests; move logging.basicConfig + logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) above the route definitions to avoid NameError when an AI failure actually occurs.

server.py /api/builds returns response_model=BuildOut but the dict still contains the BuildSave fields plus id/created_at — looks fine; just confirm Mongo _id is excluded everywhere (it already is via {'_id': 0} on the GET and .pop in POST). Good.
AISection.jsx sends entire history every request (slice(0,-1)) — fine for short sessions but consider trimming to last N turns matching backend's 8-turn cap to reduce payload.
PCBuilder.jsx option text uses interpolation only (good); the hydration warning likely comes from another component — check Header currency-select or any select with JSX children inside <option>.
Frontend has 16 case PNGs under /public/cases — all loading correctly (verified in screenshot).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: One TEST_ build created in MongoDB via POST /api/builds (name='TEST_build_pytest'). Safe to leave or remove later.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_itcan_api.py and exercise all 5 implemented routes including Gemini AI calls (~30s total). Frontend testid map: select-cpu/gpu/ram/mobo/ssd/cooler/psu/case, total-price, builder-3d, budget-slider, prebuilt-card-*, case-card-*, case-filter-{all|black|white|panoramic|cube|tower|premium}, tab-chat, tab-diag, chat-input, chat-send, chat-loading, file-input, image-preview, diagnose-desc, diagnose-btn, diagnosis-box, currency-select, floating-whatsapp. WhatsApp number: 966563036134. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY present in /app/backend/.env. All 16 case PNGs are at /app/frontend/public/cases/. Only outstanding issue: minor React hydration warning about <span> in <option>.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA — all functional. Hydration warning RCA: a select option somewhere in the tree (likely auto-inserted by FontAwesome or a wrapping component) renders a <span> as a child of <option>, which is invalid HTML and triggers React's hydration mismatch in dev. Cosmetic only.
